release_notes: V14.44 build 210 updates the Leah 2R Displays vision and mission. The full vision is shown on the startup vision screen, while the Web UI shows both vision and mission above Current status. First-time Wi-Fi setup now requires the customer to choose a memorable local .local address; friendly input such as Mat CGM 1.local is normalised to mat-cgm-1.local, stored in NVS and can be edited later from the dashboard or Wi-Fi page. Build 209 branding, Build 208 snooze reset-on-clear and all final display, Nightscout, IOB/COB, SAGE and OTA safety functions are preserved.
